quotes.quote: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
quotes.speaker: Confucius

quotes.quote: Dreams don't work unless you do.
quotes.speaker: John C. Maxwell

quotes.quote: Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.
quotes.speaker: Thomas A. Edison

quotes.quote: Vision without action is a daydream. Action without vision is a nightmare.
quotes.speaker: Japanese Proverb

quotes.quote: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
quotes.speaker: Sam Levenson

quotes.quote: Why waste time proving how great you are, when you could be getting better?
quotes.speaker: Carol Dweck

quotes.quote: Be so good they can't ignore you.
quotes.speaker: Steve Martin

quotes.quote: Most people overestimate what they can do in one year and underestimate what they can do in ten years.
quotes.speaker: Bill Gates

quotes.quote: Creativity is just connecting things.
quotes.speaker: Steve Jobs

quotes.quote: Creativity is a habit, and the best creativity is a result of good work habits.
quotes.speaker: Twyla Tharp

quotes.quote: When something is important enough, you do it even if the odds are not in your favor.
quotes.speaker: Elon Musk

quotes.quote: A goal properly set is halfway reached.
quotes.speaker: Zig Ziglar

quotes.quote: You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
quotes.speaker: Wayne Gretzky

quotes.quote: The only way to discover the limits of the possible is to go beyond them into the impossible.
quotes.speaker: Arthur C. Clarke

quotes.quote: The most dangerous phrase in the language is, 'We've always done it this way.'
quotes.speaker: Grace Hopper

quotes.quote: The beautiful thing about learning is that no one can take it away from you.
quotes.speaker: B. B. King

quotes.quote: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
quotes.speaker: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.quote: Study hard what interests you the most in the most undisciplined, irreverent and original manner possible.
quotes.speaker: Richard Feynman

quotes.quote: Done is better than perfect.
quotes.speaker: Sheryl Sandberg

quotes.quote: If you're not prepared to be wrong, you'll never come up with anything original.
quotes.speaker: Sir Ken Robinson

quotes.quote: Patience is bitter, but its fruit is sweet.
quotes.speaker: Aristotle

quotes.quote: Patience is not simply the ability to wait—it’s how we behave while we’re waiting.
quotes.speaker: Joyce Meyer

quotes.quote: All things are difficult before they are easy.
quotes.speaker: Thomas Fuller

quotes.quote: It always seems impossible until it's done.
quotes.speaker: Nelson Mandela

quotes.quote: Little by little, a little becomes a lot.
quotes.speaker: African Proverb

quotes.quote: It is not that we have a short time to live, but that we waste a lot of it.
quotes.speaker: Seneca

quotes.quote: Time is the most valuable thing that a man can spend.
quotes.speaker: Theophrastus

quotes.quote: Dost thou love life? Then do not squander time, for that's the stuff life is made of.
quotes.speaker: Benjamin Franklin

quotes.quote: Time is what we want most, but what we use worst.
quotes.speaker: William Penn

quotes.quote: Yesterday is gone. Tomorrow has not yet come. We have only today. Let us begin.
quotes.speaker: Mother Teresa
